notes: This screen is ready for future live OpenClaw cron integration. For now it uses a local data source so the UI and structure are in place.

jobs.name: Morning Operator Review
jobs.purpose: Review goals, recent memory, and complete one high-leverage task.

jobs.name: Memory Curation
jobs.purpose: Review recent daily logs and distill durable insights into long-term memory.

jobs.name: R&D Council Review
jobs.purpose: Generate multi-model memos and next actions for active projects.
